eventTypes.name: Vehicle Purchase
eventTypes.description: Buying a new car, bike, or vehicle

eventTypes.name: New Job
eventTypes.description: Starting a new job or career

generalGuidelines: Always consult a knowledgeable scholar or priest for important life decisions
These are general guidelines based on traditional Panchang principles
Individual horoscopes may affect suitability of specific dates
Shukla Paksha (waxing moon phase) is generally preferred for new beginnings
Avoid Amavasya (new moon) and specific inauspicious days for major activities

vehicle.notes: Thursday (Guruvar) and Friday (Shukravar) are considered especially favorable for vehicle purchases.

gold.notes: Akshaya Tritiya is considered the most auspicious day for gold purchase. Dhanteras is also highly favored.

business.notes: Thursday is considered especially auspicious for business ventures as it is governed by Jupiter, the planet of wealth and wisdom.

job.notes: Starting a new job on a Thursday or Monday is traditionally considered auspicious.

housewarming.notes: For housewarming, the nakshatra is also very important. Rohini, Mrigashira, Uttara Phalguni, Hasta, and Uttara Ashadha are considered auspicious.

travel.notes: The direction of travel also matters in traditional guidance. Consult with a scholar for specific travel muhurat.

property.notes: Property dealings should ideally be done during Shukla Paksha. Rohini, Uttara Phalguni, and Uttara Ashadha nakshatras are favorable.

education.notes: Thursday (day of Jupiter/Brihaspati — the guru of the gods) is considered most auspicious for educational beginnings. Vasant Panchami is traditionally the most auspicious day to begin learning.

marriage.notes: Marriage muhurat requires detailed analysis of both horoscopes. Specific months and nakshatras are preferred. Always consult with a qualified Jyotish scholar for marriage dates.

disclaimer: This information is based on general traditional Panchang guidelines. For important life decisions, please consult with a qualified Kashmiri Pandit scholar or priest who can provide personalized guidance based on your specific circumstances and horoscope. This platform does not replace expert consultation.
